title: Flame Sentinel applies 10 damage over 2 cycles

card.rawText: When your opponent finishes their attack, play this card. Negate the attack and equip this card to the attacking creature. The equipped creature receives 10 damage once per turn cycle for 2 turn cycles.

effect.value: When your opponent finishes their attack, play this card. Negate the attack and equip this card to the attacking creature. The equipped creature receives 10 damage once per turn cycle for 2 turn cycles.

plan.title: Flame Sentinel applies 10 damage over 2 cycles

notes: Read text first: When your opponent finishes their attack, play this card. Negate the attack and equip this card to the attacking creature. The equipped creature receives 10 damage once per turn cycle for 2 turn cycles.

steps: Play Flame Sentinel after opponent attack.
